2025-26 Weber State Wildcats Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 16-16 (10-8, 4th in Big Sky MBB)

Coach: Eric Duft

PS/G: 81.2 (62nd of 365)

PA/G: 77.3 (272nd of 365)

SRS: -3.20 (196th of 365)

SOS: -2.96 (208th of 365)

ORtg: 113.6 (90th of 365)

DRtg: 108.2 (217th of 365)
